_comment: The 10-use-case matrix. Every use case ships web + android + iOS. archetype: N=native-split(web+android+ios) R=RN-split(web+mobile, RN spans android+iOS) F=Flutter+web(web+app, Flutter app spans android+iOS). Components are expanded deterministically from archetype by lib/prompts.expand_components().

use_cases.name: Creator community
use_cases.features: GROUP CHAT is a FIRST-CLASS feature IN ADDITION to 1:1 DMs (a creator community is built around community groups). EVERY client (web + Android + iOS) MUST support: (1) a GROUPS list of the community groups the user belongs to, plus creating and joining a public CometChat group; (2) GROUP messaging - text AND at least one IMAGE/media message posted to a group thread (same media rule as 1:1); (3) a GROUP voice/video call started from inside a group conversation. 1:1 DMs remain fully supported (the fixed chat-a/chat-b 1:1 flow still applies). SEED at least one group uid 'cre-grp-001' with 3+ members drawn from the seeded users and a few seeded group messages so the group thread is non-empty on first load. The Key user flows section MUST include a GROUP flow (open the seeded group -> send text -> send an image -> start a group call) ALONGSIDE the 1:1 automation flow, and the screen/component map MUST show a groups list + group conversation on every client.

_waves_note: Conductor drives 2 use cases per wave; next wave starts only after both reach push-branch. Edit to match your agreed wave plan.
